description: Codex CLI enforcement config for the SDD quality loop. Codex CLI reads this file (requires the 'plugin_hooks' feature flag). 'command' is the POSIX invocation; 'command_windows' is the Codex Windows override. Claude Code uses hooks/claude-hooks.json (referenced via .claude-plugin/plugin.json) which uses exec-form Node.js hooks instead. GitHub Copilot CLI uses hooks/copilot-hooks.json.
